mapper.select: select * from user where username=#{username} limit 1
select * from user order by id
mapper.insert: insert into user (username, password, nickname, avatar, signature, email, role, create_time, update_time) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, coalesce(#{signature}, ''), #{email}, #{role}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update user set avatar=#{avatar}, avatar_asset_id=#{avatarAssetId}, update_time=now() where username=#{username}
update user set password=#{password}, update_time=now() where username=#{username}

update user set username=#{user.username}, password=#{user.password}, nickname=#{user.nickname}, avatar=#{user.avatar}, email=#{user.email}, role=#{user.role}, update_time=now() where username=#{oldUsername}
update comment set nickname='已注销用户', avatar='', email='' where user_id=#{userId}
mapper.select: select id from user where role='ROLE_admin' order by id for update
